name: Sharp Cheddar and Onion Pizzas
recipeIngredient: 4 oz (1 cup) shredded sharp cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Sprinkle each bread shell with 1/4 cup of the shredded cheddar cheese.
3. Top the shells with coarsely chopped tomatoes, sliced olives, and chopped red onion.
4. Finish by spreading the remaining shredded cheddar cheese over the toppings.
5. Place the assembled pizzas on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 425°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
7. Serve: 2 pizzas.
